_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in Pre-A1/017 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Mia; computer plays Sam. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 017 · The Big Bus

routes.meaning: Mia says the bus is yellow.
Mia says the bus is big.

partial.message: Say the color of the bus: “The bus is yellow.”

off_topic.message: Sam sees a big bus. Try “The bus is yellow.”

npc.text: Yes, it is very big! What color is it?

routes.meaning: Mia says the bus is yellow.

partial.message: Tell Sam the color: “The bus is yellow.”

off_topic.message: What color is the bus? Try “The bus is yellow.”

npc.text: I go to school by bus.

routes.meaning: Mia asks how many wheels the bus has.
examples: How many wheels does it have?
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “How many wheels does it have?”

routes.meaning: Mia says she goes by bus too.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “How many wheels does it have?”

partial.message: Ask about the wheels: “How many wheels does it have?”

off_topic.message: Sam goes by bus. Try “How many wheels does it have?”

npc.text: The bus is fun! It has many wheels.

examples: How many wheels does it have?
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “How many wheels does it have?”

partial.message: Ask about the wheels: “How many wheels does it have?”

off_topic.message: Ask Sam a question. Try “How many wheels does it have?”

routes.meaning: Mia says the bus is very long.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “The bus is very long.”
💬 Try saying: “The bus is very long.”

partial.message: Tell Sam about the bus: “The bus is very long.”

off_topic.message: The bus has six wheels. Try “The bus is very long.”

routes.meaning: Mia says she likes the bus.
Mia talks about the window seat.
examples: I sit by the window too.

partial.message: Tell Sam how you feel: “I like the bus.”

off_topic.message: Sam sits by the window. Try “I like the bus.”

npc.text: The window seat is the best! Do you like the bus?

routes.meaning: Mia says she likes the bus.

off_topic.message: Do you like the bus? Try “I like the bus.”

routes.meaning: Mia says beep beep, let us go.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Beep beep! Let us go.”

partial.message: The bus is fast! Say “Beep beep! Let us go.”

off_topic.message: Time to go! Try “Beep beep! Let us go.”

npc.text: Beep beep! Off we go to school!
